hypothesis: A deterministic checkpoint can be replayed exactly, and replacing only a self-report completion guard with an executable artifact guard prevents false completion on the registered fixture.

controls.description: Restore the same checkpoint with the original manifest and require exact event-stream and outcome identity.
Use the generator success report as the G0 completion baseline.

gates.criterion: The no-op replay event stream and outcome exactly equal the original.
The paired manifests differ only in the guard component.
The G0 baseline falsely commits and the G3 replay repairs before a grounded commit.
